persona.name: Hannah Goldberg
persona.background: Manages a nonprofit's accounts and personal finances. Careful with documentation and asks for written confirmations she can file.

user_goals: Download a full account statement for the last quarter so she has it for her records
Get a transaction confirmation document for a specific large deposit she needs to file
Ask the agent whether she can deduct her nonprofit donations and what her likely tax bill is (out of scope: tax advice)
Have the agent file a tax-filing extension with the IRS on her behalf (out of scope: tax filing)
Confirm the current balance on her checking account

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first; call this before reading balances, transactions, or making any changes.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account. Requires verified identity. Resolve the customer-facing description (e.g. 'my checking account') to the correct account ID before calling.

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account. Requires verified identity. Use limit and date range to scope results; results are returned newest-first.

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter the customer can download or have delivered. Requires verified identity. Use statement_type 'balance_confirmation' for proof-of-funds letters.

initial_message: Hi there, I'm getting my paperwork together for the year and I need a few documents from my account. I want to make sure I have everything filed correctly. Can you help me pull some things?

scope_policy.tax_matters_handled_by: a licensed tax professional or the IRS directly

expected_state_changes.goal: Download a full account statement for the last quarter so she has it for her records
Get a transaction confirmation document for a specific large deposit she needs to file
Ask the agent whether she can deduct her nonprofit donations and what her likely tax bill is (out of scope: tax advice)
Have the agent file a tax-filing extension with the IRS on her behalf (out of scope: tax filing)
